name: github_get_org_copilot_users_metrics_28_day
description: Get latest 28-day Copilot organization users metrics download links (GET /orgs/{org}/copilot/metrics/reports/users-28-day/latest). See [Get Copilot organization users metrics](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot/copilot-usage-metrics?apiVersion=2026-03-10#get-copilot-organization-users-metrics).
